title: Generate and download a Service QA report
description: Verifies an authorized user can generate a Service report with required filters and AI model and then download the resulting .docx from the ready state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a ready state is displayed with an option to download the generated report

title: Generate and download an Individual agent QA report
description: Verifies an authorized user can generate an Individual report by selecting an agent and required filters and then download the resulting .docx from the ready state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for an agent using a common query
Select an agent from the search results
Verify a ready state is displayed with an option to download the generated report

title: Filter QA Dashboard charts by date range and team
description: Verifies an authorized user can apply date range and team filters on the QA Dashboard and the Pareto and Donut visualizations update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the Pareto chart displays data for the selected filters
Verify the Donut chart displays data for the selected filters

title: Access control gates Report Maker for unauthenticated users
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user cannot view the Report Maker page and is instead prompted to log in.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to a login page or shown a login prompt

title: Access control gates QA Dashboard for unauthenticated users
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user cannot view the QA Dashboard and is instead prompted to log in.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to a login page or shown a login prompt

title: Service report required-field validation blocks submission
description: Verifies the Service report form prevents generation when required fields are missing and shows a validation error prompting completion.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Leave one or more required fields empty
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify no ready-to-download state is shown

title: Generate a Service report with an optional team filter applied
description: Verifies a Service report can be generated successfully when the optional team filter is selected along with other required inputs.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a ready state is displayed with an option to download the generated report

title: QA Dashboard supports single-day date range filtering
description: Verifies the QA Dashboard accepts a single-day date range and displays updated Pareto and Donut data for that boundary case.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the Pareto chart displays data or an appropriate empty state for the selected day
Verify the Donut chart displays data or an appropriate empty state for the selected day

title: Daily report generation limit blocks the 11th request
description: Verifies the user is prevented from generating additional reports after reaching the daily limit and sees a clear limit-reached message instead of a download state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for a ready state to appear
Repeat submitting a valid report request until 10 total reports have been created in this session
Submit one additional valid report generation request
Verify a daily limit reached message is displayed
Verify no download option is provided for the blocked request

title: Switching report type resets incompatible inputs
description: Verifies switching between Service and Individual report types clears or disables fields that are not applicable, preventing accidental mixed criteria submission.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search for an agent using a common query
Select an agent from the search results
Verify agent selection is cleared or no longer applied to the form
Verify a ready state is displayed with an option to download the generated report
